scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check api/index.js && node --check js/admin.js && node --check js/bookings.js && node --check js/settings.js && node --check js/gallery.js
scripts.smoke: node -e "const app=require('./api/index'); const server=app.listen(0, async()=>{const port=server.address().port; const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+port; const admin=await fetch(base+'/admin'); const gallery=await fetch(base+'/gallery.html'); console.log(admin.status, gallery.status); server.close();});"
